# REQ-CR-260015: Network View Must Use Circle Nodes with Visible Connector Handles

- Class: CR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-12
- Source decision: Network view visual grammar uses Neo4j-like circle nodes and side connectors

## Requirement

The Network view shall represent atoms as circle nodes and shall expose a visible connector handle on the side of each node for edge creation.

## Rationale

The desired representation is intentionally graph-database-like. Circle nodes and visible connector handles make relationship creation more discoverable and make the view feel like a node-link network rather than a flow diagram.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for this requirement: circle node shape, visible connector handle, boundary-based edge anchoring.
- Out of scope for this requirement: rectangular node shapes, hidden-only connectors, center-only edge attachment, and any Flow-view changes.

## Verification

- UI check confirms atoms render as circles in Network view.
- UI check confirms connector handles are visible and usable.
- Behavior check confirms edges anchor to the nearest circle boundary points.
- Regression check confirms Flow view remains unchanged.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260029
- Related backlog items: BI-260030
